text: The quiet tension of the hallway washes over me, an uneasy calmness echoing in the sparse, sterile space. Crossing the threshold into the next room, I’m greeted by the hum of screens and the bold statement of 'R+D' splayed on the wall. Here, the abstract mingles with the technical, inviting contemplation. I feel simultaneously alienated and curious, like a traveller on the cusp of discovery, drawn forward by the promise of meaning amid the machinery.
